name: Glow
description: A soft edge bloom. A two-pass blur softens the surface, and the result is blended back in as an inner glow plus an outer halo that follows the surface's own shape. Stack it after Border in a surface's chain to glow the rounded bordered window. Strength and tint are its parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Glow tint
parameters.description: Colour the bloom is tinted toward
